features: 【Comfort Revolution With MUSICOZY Sleep Headphones】MUSICOZY Bluetooth Sleep Headphones deliver cloud-like comfort for side sleepers, with ultra-thin, flat speakers that feel weightless all night. Designed to enjoy music without bulky earbuds, they let you drift off to music without pressing into your ears—perfect for couples sharing a bed. Enjoy 14hr battery life, instant Bluetooth pairing, and 24-month worry-free warranty. The no-pressure, no-wires sleep solution you’ve dreamed of

【Immersive Hi-Fi Sleep Soundscape】MUSICOZY Sleep Headphones Headband is engineered for sleep therapy, our bluetooth sleep headband headphones deliver studio-grade audio with balanced bass/treble (<40ms latency) - perfect for sleep assistance. The ultra-thin sleep headphones headband provides 3D surround sound with noise isolation, while built-in mic enables pillow-soft calls. Your lullabies never sounded richer in this comfort-optimized headband headphone system

【Exceptional Functionality】 Our sleep headphones deliver outstanding performance, especially ideal for special scenarios like post-surgery recovery. Their durability stands the test—even after weeks of continuous wear, these sleep headphones remain in perfect condition. Enjoy superior sound quality, convenient volume adjustment, and comfortable wear that won’t disturb your rest. It combinines the benefits of sleep headphones headband and music headbands for a truly versatile experience

【Extraordinary 14-Hour Battery Life】 with just 2h charging, delivering over two nights of uninterrupted use. Sleeping headphones feature outstanding battery performance, fast charging, and long-lasting power. Equipped with the latest Bluetooth v5.4, they ensure instant pairing with smartphones and superior sound quality for enhanced audio and sleep comfort. Designed as the perfect sleep companion, these bluetooth sleep mask and bluetooth headband headphones combine durability and convenience

【Designed Specifically For Side Sleepers】Our sleeping headphones for side sleepers feature elastic memory fabric and adjustable flat speakers that perfectly conform to any head shape and ear position. The breathable, stretchable fabric makes this sleep band ideal for active use during running, cycling, yoga, and outdoor workouts. All bluetooth sleep headphones come with 5-stars premium after-sales service—contact us via email for any issues! The perfect gift for family and friends
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Sleep Headphones 2 Bluetooth 5.4 Headbands 3 Sport Headband Headphones MUSICOZY Sleep Headphones Headbands Previous page Next page MUSICOZY Bluetooth Sleep Headphones, Wireless Sports Headphones Long-lasting Battery Life 2 hours charging = 14 hours playback The MUSICOZY Bluetooth sleep headphones feature a built-in lithium battery that requires only 2 hours of charging to deliver up to 14 hours of uninterrupted playback. Enjoy continuous music, calls, and podcasts for a full 16 hours. Super elastic fabric Exceptional stretch (300-500% elongation) and recovery properties With a stretchability of 300%-500% , it conforms perfectly fit to all head shapes , eliminating the constriction of traditional fabrics. The high rebound rate (≥90%) reduces skin marks after exercise, making it ideal for extended wear. High-Resolution Stereo Ultra-thin Speaker & Hi-Fi Sound Quality The Bluetooth sleep headphones feature 11mm wide audio drivers with a triple-coated diaphragm , delivering 30% deeper bass and 100% enhanced stereo —resulting in a powerful yet balanced sound profile! Premium Material Breathable & Highly Elastic Crafted from high-performance fabric , the MUSICOZY sports headphones feature a soft, cooling, sweat-wicking design with exceptional breathability and rapid-dry properties —making them ideal for jogging or intense workouts. Upgraded Bluetooth 5.4 Faster Transmission & Enhanced Stability Equipped with the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology , the MUSICOZY Bluetooth sleep headphones pair with your smartphone in seconds—delivering faster connectivity and uninterrupted stability . Sleep Headphones Headband | Sports Headband Comfortable & Washable Design The MUSICOZY Bluetooth sleep headphones adapt to all head shapes for a perfect fit and ultimate comfort. Blending vintage aesthetics with modern functionality, they're designed for year-round use . Note: Remove the device module before washing the headband thoroughly. The Ultimate Travel Companion Whether you're traveling by plane or car, our headphones are your perfect companion. The best Bluetooth headband for sleep, sports training, jogging, yoga, travel, and cycling. Put on our headband and embark on a joyful journey!
